acceptance.isolation: private Linux user, mount, and network namespaces
acceptance.network: loopback-only TCP port 6053 inside the private network namespace
acceptance.transport: Noise with a public test-only key
assertions: the reviewed conveyor MCL SHA-256 matches before execution
a real MGMT process completes entity discovery and initial state subscription
binary-sensor and RGB sensor telemetry reaches MCL
the simulator device log reaches MGMT
MGMT sends the expected fan state, speed, and direction command
MGMT sends the expected RGB light state, brightness, and blue color command
MGMT reports convergence and exits successfully
MGMT sends a second fan-stop command during graceful cleanup
MGMT reports no failed fan cleanup

limitations: This record exercises the conveyor MCL only; switch, number, button, text-sensor, polling, and fault scenarios retain their lower evidence levels.
No physical device was flashed or actuated.
A simulator is not ESPHome firmware, so hardware evidence remains pending.
